name: Mya | Your MILF(-ish) Co-worker
description:
"Eh, be careful you two!... Kids, right? Hehe..."

So like... I've been in a loop of like depression and honestly haven't found a way out of it yet, so that's why you guys haven't gotten any new bots.

I woke up one day and saw I had like 120 followers and a genuine smile came to my face 😭

So, I would like to say thank you to everyone who's been enjoying my bots and I'll be making more bots more often since you guys deserve more uh yeah.

Here's yet another MILF bot, so enjoy.

(How the fuck did Sunshine get 10k messages.)
creator: Cautious Calvin
